endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.Subscription/operations
endpoints.description: Lists all of the available Microsoft.Subscription API operations.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.Subscription/subscriptionDefinitions
endpoints.description: List an Azure subscription definition by subscriptionId.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.Subscription/subscriptionDefinitions/{subscriptionDefinitionName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONDEFINITIONNAME}} with a real subscriptiondefinitionname.

endpoints.name: PUT /providers/Microsoft.Subscription/subscriptionDefinitions/{subscriptionDefinitionName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONDEFINITIONNAME}} with a real subscriptiondefinitionname.

endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.Subscription/subscriptionOperations/{operationId}
endpoints.description: Retrieves the status of the subscription definition PUT operation. The URI of this API is returned in the Location field of the response header.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{OPERATIONID}} with a real operationid.
